name: Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Horse Prince
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>侯</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ホウシン
desc:
1 FIRE Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
When this card is Synchro Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 3 FIRE monster from your Deck. After you Synchro Summon this card, you cannot Special Summon Level 5 or higher monsters for the rest of the turn.
